summary: Iteration 46 testing completed for Notification Center Dropdown feature. All core features working: Bell button visible for all roles (admin, manager, server), big red animated badge shows total count, dropdown opens with notification categories sorted by count desc, clicking category navigates to correct tab AND marks as read, 'Tout marquer lu' marks all read and closes dropdown, localStorage persistence works, empty state shows green CheckCircle with 'Aucune notification en attente'.

minor.issue: Console warning about HTML nesting (<tr> inside <span>) in PurchaseOrdersTab - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: None - used existing notification counts from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 tested new Notification Center Dropdown feature. Key test IDs: notif-center-btn (Bell button), notif-center-badge (red animated badge), notif-center-dropdown (dropdown container), notif-mark-all-read ('Tout marquer lu' button), notif-item-{key} (notification rows where key ∈ {needs, purchase_orders, expenses, cancellation_requests, modification_requests, invoices, financial_points, tips_today, notes}). Tab badges now use effectiveCounts (raw - ack). localStorage key 'caisse_notif_ack' stores acknowledged counts. Server role only sees 'notes' category. Manager sees: invoices, purchase_orders, notes, expenses. Admin sees all 9 categories.

tests: Admin login: Bell button (notif-center-btn) visible
Manager login: Bell button visible
Server login: Bell button visible
Badge (notif-center-badge) shows total effective count
Badge has red animated pulse effect
Badge disappears when effectiveTotal = 0
Click Bell → dropdown (notif-center-dropdown) opens
Dropdown shows 'Tout marquer lu' button when total > 0
Notification rows sorted by count descending
Each row shows: colored dot + label + count + chevron-right
Click 'needs' → navigates to Besoins tab (value='needs')
Click 'purchase_orders' → navigates to Fournisseurs tab (value='po')
Click 'expenses' → navigates to Achats tab (value='achats')
Dropdown closes after navigation
Click notification row → marks that category as read
Click 'Tout marquer lu' → marks all categories as read
Tab badges update to reflect effective counts (raw - ack)
Besoins tab badge disappeared after marking 'needs' read
Acknowledged counts saved to localStorage key 'caisse_notif_ack'
Badges remain cleared after page reload
Format: JSON object with category keys and count values
When effectiveTotal = 0, dropdown shows 'Aucune notification en attente'
Green CheckCircle icon visible in empty state
Admin sees all 9 notification categories
Manager sees 4 categories: invoices, purchase_orders, notes, expenses
Server sees only 1 category: notes
